sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89576" key="proskaustiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσ-καυστικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n89576.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">apt to burn</tr_> the meat, of a cook, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0500.tlg001:1:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Posidipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
